message:
fix(fcp-webhook): cap Stripe signature count to prevent unbounded allocation br-2ot4f

An adversarial Stripe-Signature header with millions of v1= entries
could cause unbounded Vec growth. Cap at 10 signatures (Stripe uses
at most 2-3 during key rotation).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
